description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-help-text` (T4-05) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-help-text/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, variant typed (default/error/warning/success), for/id association typed
2. Accessibility — associated to form control via `id`/`aria-describedby` pattern, error variant uses appropriate contrast and icon, not solely color for error state (WCAG 1.4.1), axe-core pass
3. Tests — all variants, association to input, error announcement, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — all variants, in context with form fields
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, variant colors via tokens, CSS parts (text, icon)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable as form element helper

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-help-text/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-help-text — T4-05 antagonistic quality review
